summary: Built 6 diagram components (HarnessLoop, ParallelLeads, HackathonTimeline, AltitudeProgression, TwoDocuments, ComposedStack) in src/components/diagrams/ with shared animation variants module and barrel export. All use Framer Motion draw/fade SVG animations with #f59e0b accent color, matching existing SectionGraphic.tsx patterns.
notes: Barrel export (index.ts) was expanded beyond the original 6 components to include all 12 diagram components found in the directory (other climbs created ThreeHats, BoundaryDiagram, BuildingBlocks, FlowDiagram, ImpactPyramid, AmplificationFlow). Build passes clean.
